inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the item.

inputs.name: href
inputs.description:
Defines the link href.

*Note:** Standard hyperlink behavior is supported.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description:
Defines the link target.

Available options are:

- `_self`
- `_top`
- `_blank`
- `_parent`
- `_search`

*Note:** This property must only be used when the `href` property is set.

outputs.name: ui5Click
outputs.description:
Fired when the component is activated either with a mouse/tap or by using the Enter or Space key.

*Note:** The event is also fired for the current page location item (the last item), which is not a link by design.
